Privacy Policy

Last updated: October 11, 2025

At TipTop360, we respect your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information when you visit our website or place an order.

By using our website, you agree to the practices described below.

🔎 Quick Privacy Summary

TipTop360 collects personal information to process orders, improve the shopping experience, prevent fraud, and comply with legal obligations. We do not sell personal data. You may contact us anytime to request access, correction, or deletion of your information.

1. What Personal Information We Collect

We collect personal information to provide a safe and smooth shopping experience.

Information you provide directly

  • Name and contact details (email, phone number, address)
  • Billing and shipping information
  • Account login details
  • Customer support communications
  • Order and purchase history

Information collected automatically

  • Device and browser information
  • IP address and approximate location
  • Pages visited and interactions on our website
  • Cookies and similar tracking technologies

Information from trusted partners

  • Payment processors
  • Shipping and logistics providers
  • Marketing and analytics services

2. Why We Collect Your Information

We use your information to operate and improve our services.

Order processing and fulfillment

  • Process payments securely
  • Deliver orders and manage shipping
  • Handle returns and exchanges
  • Send order updates

Account management

  • Create and manage your account
  • Save preferences and order history
  • Improve user experience

Marketing and communication

  • Send promotions and updates (you may unsubscribe anytime)
  • Show relevant products and offers

Security and fraud prevention

  • Detect suspicious activity
  • Protect accounts and transactions

Legal obligations

  • Comply with applicable laws and regulations
  • Respond to legal requests when required

3. How We Share Your Information

We only share information when necessary to operate our business.

We may share data with:

  • Shopify (our ecommerce platform)
  • Payment service providers
  • Shipping and fulfillment partners
  • Analytics and marketing providers
  • Authorities when required by law

Each provider handles data according to their own privacy policies.

4. Shopify Services

TipTop360 uses Shopify to power our online store. Shopify may process your information to provide secure checkout, hosting, and analytics services.

Learn more:

  • Shopify Consumer Privacy Policy
  • Shopify Privacy Portal

5. Cookies and Tracking Technologies

We use cookies to:

  • Remember preferences
  • Improve website performance
  • Analyze website traffic
  • Personalize ads and recommendations

You can control or disable cookies through your browser settings.

6. Third-Party Links

Our website may include links to third-party websites.

We are not responsible for the privacy practices of external sites. Please review their privacy policies before sharing information.

7. Children’s Privacy

Our services are not intended for children.

We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under the legal age in their country. Parents or guardians may contact us to request deletion of data.

8. Data Security and Retention

We use industry-standard security measures to protect your information.

No online system is completely secure, so please avoid sharing sensitive information through insecure channels.

We retain data only as long as needed to:

  • Provide services
  • Meet legal obligations
  • Resolve disputes
  • Enforce agreements

9. Your Privacy Rights

Depending on your location, you may have the right to:

  • Access your personal data
  • Correct inaccurate information
  • Request deletion of data
  • Receive a copy of your data
  • Opt out of marketing communications

To exercise your rights, contact us using the information below.

10. International Data Transfers

Your information may be processed or stored outside your country.

When transferring data internationally, we apply recognized safeguards to protect your information.

11. Updates to This Policy

We may update this policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices or legal requirements.

The latest version will always appear on this page with a revised “Last updated” date.

12. Contact Us

If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or your personal data, contact us:

Email: Info@tiptop360.com
Address: Al Shuhada' Road, Al Hamra Industry Zone-FZ, Al Jazeera Al Hamra Industrial, Ras Al Khaimah, UAE

❓ Privacy Policy FAQ 

Does TipTop360 sell my personal data?

No. TipTop360 does not sell personal information. Data is only used to operate and improve our services.

How can I request deletion of my data?

You can contact us at Info@tiptop360.com and request deletion of your personal data. We will process requests according to applicable laws.

Why does TipTop360 use cookies?

Cookies help us improve website performance, remember your preferences, and provide personalized shopping experiences.

How does TipTop360 protect my information?

We use industry-standard security measures and trusted service providers to protect your data from unauthorized access.

Can I opt out of marketing emails?

Yes. Every marketing email includes an unsubscribe link, or you can contact us directly.

Effective Date: April 2025

At TipTop360, we are committed to your satisfaction. While we hope you love every product you receive, we understand that returns may occasionally be necessary. The following policy outlines the terms and conditions for eligible returns and refunds.

1. Return Eligibility

  • Returns are accepted within 3 days of receiving your order.
  • Items must be unused, undamaged, and in their original packaging.
  • All return requests must be submitted in writing via email.

To initiate a return, contact us at info@tiptop360.com with your order number and reason for return. Our team will guide you through the process and provide return instructions.

2. Refund Process

  • Once a return is received and inspected, and confirmed to meet our return conditions, a refund will be issued within 5–7 business days to the original payment method.
  • We reserve the right to refuse returns that do not comply with our policy.
  • Shipping fees (if applicable) are non-refundable unless the return is due to our error or a defective product.

3. Non-Returnable Items

For hygiene, safety, or clearance-related reasons, the following products are not eligible for return or refund:

  • Personal care and hygiene products (e.g., toothbrushes, grooming tools)
  • Items sold as part of a clearance sale or final markdown
  • Custom-made or personalized products

4. Legal Compliance

This return policy is compliant with the UAE Consumer Protection Law – Federal Law No. (15) of 2020. We are committed to respecting your rights and handling each return with care and transparency.

5. Important Reminders

  • We do not accept returns for used items or items no longer in their original condition.
  • Please read all product details and specifications carefully before completing your purchase.

6. Need Help?

If you have any questions or need assistance with your return, our team is here to help.

  • Email: info@tiptop360.com
  • WhatsApp: +971 585156033

At TipTop360, we aim to deliver your orders quickly, safely, and transparently across the United Arab Emirates.

This Shipping Policy explains our delivery coverage, processing times, fees, and what to expect after placing an order.

🇦🇪 Delivery Coverage

We currently ship to all Emirates in the UAE, including:

  • Dubai
  • Abu Dhabi
  • Sharjah
  • Ras Al Khaimah
  • Ajman
  • Umm Al Quwain
  • Fujairah

If your location is within the UAE, we can deliver to your doorstep.

⏳ Order Processing Time

Orders are usually processed within:

1–2 business days

Processing includes order confirmation, packing, and handover to our courier partner.

Orders placed on weekends or public holidays are processed the next business day.

🚚 Delivery Timeframes

Estimated delivery times after dispatch:

  • All Emirates: 1–2 business days

Delivery times may vary during peak seasons, promotions, or unforeseen courier delays.

💳 Cash on Delivery & Payment Options

We offer:

  • Cash on Delivery (COD) on eligible orders
  • Credit/Debit Cards
  • Digital wallets where available

Available payment methods will appear at checkout.

💰 Shipping Fees

Shipping charges (if applicable) are displayed clearly at checkout before payment is completed.

Promotions offering free shipping may apply for selected products or order values.

📦 Order Tracking

Once your order is dispatched, you may receive:

  • An SMS or email confirmation
  • Tracking details when available

You can also contact our support team for delivery updates.

🚪 Delivery Attempts

Our courier partners usually attempt delivery up to two times.

If delivery is unsuccessful due to an incorrect address or unavailability:

  • Our team may contact you to reschedule
  • Orders not accepted or repeatedly missed may be subject to return shipping fees

📝 Incorrect Address Information

Please ensure your delivery address and phone number are accurate at checkout.

TipTop360 is not responsible for delays or failed deliveries caused by incorrect or incomplete customer information.

🔁 Damaged or Missing Items During Delivery

If your order arrives damaged or incomplete:

  1. Take clear photos of the packaging and item
  2. Contact us within 3 days of delivery
  3. Include your order number in the message

We will investigate and assist promptly.

📬 How to Contact Us

For shipping questions or delivery updates, contact our support team:

📧 Email: info@tiptop360.com
📞 Phone/WhatsApp: +971 58 515 6033

Customer service is available daily.

📌 Policy Updates

This Shipping Policy may be updated from time to time to reflect operational or legal changes.

The latest version will always be available on this page.

Effective Date: April 2025

الشروط والأحكام

Welcome to TipTop360. By accessing or using our website (www.tiptop360.com) or making a purchase, you agree to the terms outlined below. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.

1. Company Information

By using our website tiptop360.com, operated by Sylo Commerce FZ-LLC, you agree to the following terms and conditions. These terms govern your use of the site and all purchases made from it.

2. Eligibility & Website Use

  • You must be 18 years or older, or have parental/legal guardian permission to use our site.
  • You agree not to misuse the website in any way, including unauthorized access, scraping data, or posting offensive content.
  • All content, branding, product descriptions, and images are owned by or licensed to TipTop360. Reproduction without written consent is prohibited.

3. Orders & Payments

  • All prices are listed in AED (United Arab Emirates Dirhams) and include VAT where applicable.
  • We accept major credit/debit cards and Cash on Delivery and other secure payment gateways.
  • We reserve the right to cancel or refuse any order, including for pricing errors, stock issues, or suspected fraud. If canceled, you will be notified and refunded promptly.

4. Shipping & Delivery

  • We ship across the UAE within 1–3 business days.
  • International shipping may be available with estimated delivery times displayed at checkout.
  • We are not liable for delays caused by customs, carriers, weather, or force majeure events. However, we will assist in tracking and resolving any issues.

5. Customer Shipping Responsibility

Please verify your shipping information before placing your order.

  • No refunds will be issued for orders with incorrect, incomplete, or changed addresses submitted after dispatch.
  • If an address error requires rerouting or reshipping, the customer will bear all additional shipping costs.
  • Once an order is confirmed, we cannot guarantee changes to shipping details.

Tip: Double-check your address to avoid delays and extra charges.

6. Returns & Refunds

  • Returns must be requested within 3 days of delivery, and items must be unused, unopened, and in original packaging.
  • Contact us at info@tiptop360.com with your order number and reason for return.
  • Refunds are processed within 5–7 business days after the return is approved.
  • Final sale, clearance, and hygiene-related items are not eligible for return.

  • Important Notice:

    Returns are strictly accepted only if the product is unused, sealed, and in its original packaging with all accessories intact.

    ⚠️ Hygiene products cannot be returned once opened or used.

These terms comply with the UAE Consumer Protection Law – Federal Law No. (15) of 2020.

7. Product Accuracy & Availability

  • We strive for accurate product descriptions and pricing.
  • Minor variations in packaging may occur.
  • If an item is out of stock post-purchase, we’ll notify you with alternatives or a refund.

8. Privacy & Data Protection

We respect your privacy. Data is collected and processed in accordance with our Privacy Policy and UAE data protection regulations.

  • We do not sell or share personal data without consent.
  • Your information is used only for order fulfillment, customer service, and (optional) marketing purposes.

9. Limitation of Liability

  • TipTop360 is not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages resulting from the use of our website or products.
  • Our total liability is limited to the purchase amount paid by the customer.

All products are sold “as is.” We do not accept responsibility for misuse. Always supervise children while using our products.

We are not liable for indirect or consequential losses from using this site or our products.

10. Updates to Terms

We may update these Terms of Service at any time. Changes will be posted on this page. Continued use of the site indicates acceptance of the updated terms.

11. Contact Us

Have questions? We're happy to help.

  • Email: info@tiptop360.com
  • WhatsApp: +971 585156033
